preferred_components.reason: Primary trading actions use a wrapper that adds analytics, permissions, and sentiment defaults.
Inputs are wrapped to attach field telemetry and product-level validation copy.

approved_wrappers.name: TradeButton
approved_wrappers.reason: Adds analytics and standardized trade action defaults.

approved_wrappers.name: TradeInput
approved_wrappers.reason: Adds product validation and telemetry without replacing the canonical Salt field primitive.

notes: Prefer wrappers only when they add stable product behavior or telemetry.
Do not treat wrapper names as canonical Salt entities.
